### Hi, I'm Jules Ivanic 👋

Software engineer based in Australia 🇦🇺

🔭 My open-source projects live under **[@guizmaii-opensource](https://github.com/guizmaii-opensource)** — mostly Scala & ZIO libraries and sbt plugins.
